completed_tasks.name: Enable Astro View Transitions in BaseLayout + add mode prop
completed_tasks.summary: Imported ClientRouter from astro:transitions, rendered in <head>. Added mode?: 'planning' | 'onsite' prop to BaseLayout with default 'planning'. Bound data-mode={mode} on <html>. Updated index.astro to pass mode='planning' explicitly.

remaining_tasks.name: Create /onsite stub route
remaining_tasks.commit_message: feat: add /onsite stub route with data-mode='onsite'

remaining_tasks.name: Refactor StickyCTA mode toggle to URL-as-state
remaining_tasks.commit_message: refactor(sticky-cta): mode toggle becomes route-aware <a href> navigation

remaining_tasks.name: Refactor HamburgerOverlay mode toggle to URL-as-state
remaining_tasks.commit_message: refactor(hamburger-overlay): mode toggle becomes route-aware <a href> navigation
remaining_tasks.notes: Must add click handler that closes overlay before navigation, otherwise View Transitions will animate the overlay itself.

remaining_tasks.name: Refactor FooterColumns mode toggle to URL-as-state
remaining_tasks.commit_message: refactor(footer-columns): mode toggle becomes route-aware <a href> navigation

remaining_tasks.name: Refactor or remove ModeToggle React island
remaining_tasks.commit_message: refactor(mode-toggle): route-aware navigation or removal if unused
remaining_tasks.notes: First grep for ModeToggle usage. If unused, delete. If used, refactor to <a href> navigation.

remaining_tasks.name: Integration test — full Phase 03-01 flow verification
remaining_tasks.notes: Manual verification against all 10 success criteria in 03-01-PLAN.md. Also: grep -rn 'kunsthaus-mode' src/ must return zero matches outside comments.

blockers.description: Context window at 78% at pause time. Remaining 6 tasks touch 4 large files (500+ lines each). Continuing would risk mid-task exhaustion and inconsistent codebase state.
blockers.workaround: Fresh session with /clear resets context. Resume session should cruise through Tasks 2-7 in ~1 hour.

decisions.decision: Routing Plan A: Astro routes + View Transitions + URL-as-state
decisions.rationale: Real pages, deep-linkable, back/forward works, animated swap via native View Transitions API. localStorage mode persistence removed entirely.

decisions.decision: Mode toggle becomes route-aware <a href> navigation across all 4 writers
decisions.rationale: Single source of truth (URL), server-rendered active state, no JS state synchronization needed.

decisions.decision: BaseLayout gets mode?: 'planning' | 'onsite' prop, default 'planning', bound to html[data-mode]
decisions.rationale: Each page declares its mode at render time via layout prop. JS never mutates data-mode anywhere.

decisions.decision: Astro View Transitions replace the earlier ANIM-04 requirement (GSAP Flip mode transitions)
decisions.rationale: Native browser API achieves the same smooth palette flip with zero custom animation code. Graceful fallback on unsupported browsers.

next_action: Start Task 2: Create src/pages/onsite/index.astro as a minimal BaseLayout stub with mode='onsite' and a placeholder heading. Verify /onsite renders with dark palette before moving to Task 3.
context_notes: Phase 03 is the pitch differentiator for the Kunsthaus competition. Demo is 2026-04-22 (8 days from handoff). 03-01 is the critical path routing foundation. 03-02 is the shippable baseline (onsite landing). 03-03/04 add depth (KJM detail + audio guide) but are not load-bearing. User can ship after 03-02 if time gets tight. All design decisions are in 03-CONTEXT.md; execution steps are in 03-01-PLAN.md. Task 1 is already committed (98581d8) and pushed. The 4 mode-toggle writers each need the same refactor pattern applied — StickyCTA, HamburgerOverlay, FooterColumns, ModeToggle.tsx. Key anti-pattern: do NOT use window.location.href for navigation — use <a href> tags so Astro intercepts them for View Transitions. Also do not manually set data-mode via JS anywhere anymore.
